results.title: City approves agreement for below-market housing
results.description: Livingston City Commissioners voted unanimously Tuesday to approve a development agreement with Bozeman-based Boundary Development for the construction of a 48-unit apartment complex.

results.title: Mobix Labs to Acquire U.S.-Built Drone Manufacturer Vision Aerial, Expanding Into Global Drone and Aerial Intelligence Markets
results.description: Mobix Labs, Inc. (Nasdaq: MOBX) today announced that it has signed a binding Letter of Intent to acquire Vision Aerial, Inc., a Montana-based manufacturer of American-built drones trusted in national security, government, energy, public safety, and critical infrastructure operations. The acquisition expands Mobix Labs into a fast-growing global market and marks the latest step in its previously [...]
